title: Pternandra tuberculata
taxonomy: Pternandra tuberculata is classified within the family Sapindaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the soapberry family or lychee family. This plant is native to Australia and is a member of the genus Pternandra. The genus Pternandra is part of the order Sapindales and the clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms. Pternandra tuberculata belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the superkingdom Eukarya. The classification of Pternandra tuberculata is further divided into its species classification within the botanical nomenclature.
